steps.title: Match slopes with different intercepts
steps.content: For no solution, the second equation needs the same slope (ratio of $x$ to $y$) but a different constant. Choice A: $\frac{1}{30}x=2y$ scales to $x=60y$, same slope, different constant.

steps.title: Identify the choice
steps.content: Choice A produces parallel lines with no intersection. That matches choice A — A is correct.
